title: Chisels & Bits for TFC // 1.18.2 // 1.20.1 //
body:
========================================================
> #### required additional mods ''Chisels&Bits'' and ''Terrafirmacraft''
========================================================


- This little Mod adapts and combines Chisels&Bits with the TFC environment.
- Here you will find new recipes for tools adapted to items available in the TFC world.
- added the ability to carve in all types of stone from the TFC world.



## create original and beautiful sculptures or decorate your buildings


![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6AJNcGU2/images/33581a4f9041a27fe7c40befc95af3f5bb5958d1.png)
